title: Lefpud's FNAF Modpack
description: Lefpud's FNAF Modpack includes almost every FNAF mod out there on forge as well as a plentiful amount of decor mods and technical mods to help create the best FNAF map you can make.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/H46kju-t-mU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Survive the night in Lefpud’s FNAF Modpack! Packed with animatronics, spooky locations, and atmospheric additions, this modpack turns Minecraft into your own FNAF adventure.
All mods belong to their rightful creators. None of the mods or copyrighted content in this pack are my own—I’m only compiling them for fans to enjoy.

*Most of the mods required for this modpack can't be added to this modpack due to copyright. Please download the mods below manually for the complete experience.*

Project Nightshift
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-nightshift

FNaF's Universe & Fanverse
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fnafs-universe-fanverse

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fnafs-decorations-java-edition
